projects.name: Bondly — Keep Your Network Alive
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: Developed a modern relationship management web application that helps users build, organize, and maintain meaningful personal and professional connections through a clean and intuitive interface.
projects.details: This project demonstrates scalable frontend architecture using Next.js and React, efficient state management with Context API, and interactive data visualization using Recharts.
keyContributions: Designed and developed a responsive UI with Tailwind CSS and daisyUI
Implemented Context API for global state management
Built dynamic routing using Next.js App Router
Added toast notifications for real-time feedback

projects.name: Simple BookStore – Premium Literature Exploration UI
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: A minimal web application for managing reading collections with clean UI and structured UX.
projects.details: Showcases React Router, LocalStorage persistence, and a refined UI system using Tailwind and DaisyUI.
keyContributions: Used Lucide icons and Google Fonts

projects.name: DigiTools Platform – React E-commerce UI with Dynamic Cart
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: A digital tools marketplace UI with cart functionality and interactive components.
projects.details: Focuses on state management and reusable component architecture.

projects.name: Get Advice – React Suspense App
projects.label: Practice Project
projects.description: A React app demonstrating modern async rendering using Suspense and use() hook.
projects.details: Focuses on modern React data-fetching patterns and API handling.
